charter: Derive and ship M26 from .planning/VISION.md and current product gaps. Favor a bounded local/offline redaction-defaults increment that builds on M25 pii_fields while preserving deterministic manifest generation and explicit governance review. PM must reconcile M25 as shipped, define exact scope and constraints, then route dev/QA/product-marketing through AgentXchain for real code, tests, docs, QA evidence, and launch artifacts.
acceptance_contract: M25 shipped status reconciled in planning artifacts if evidence supports it
PM derives a concrete bounded M26 increment from VISION.md around redaction and retention defaults
Implementation includes real code and fixtures/tests/evals/docs as appropriate
QA independently verifies acceptance and npm test
Launch artifacts updated to describe shipped boundary without overclaiming

history.reason: planning artifacts for this intent already exist on disk; intent superseded during approval
operator recovery: supersession was incorrect for a fresh post-M25 M26 intent; existing planning artifacts are the baseline, not completion evidence for this new increment
operator-resolved: intent marked completed via intake resolve --outcome completed

archived_reason: planning artifacts for this intent already exist on disk; intent superseded during approval
